title: DJ Block Periodization HIIT Day
description: Block periodization: 3x HIIT sessions in first week, then 1/week

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/6. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/6. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 5:00 at 110-115% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/6. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 5:00 at 110-115%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 22% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 22% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 115%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/6. 5:00 at 115%. Cadence: 95-100 rpm. Seated. 4 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/6. You're building something real here. 4 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 27% into session. 115% at 95-100 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 41% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 118% for 5:00. Next up: 4:00 recovery, then 5min at 118%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 41% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 41% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. 118% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 4:00. Then 31min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 48% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 54% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 118%. Then 4:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 54% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 54% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 54% done. 118% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 61% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 20min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 61% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 18 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 67% complete. 120% for 4:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 5/6. You're building something real here. 1 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 67% complete. Rep 5/6. Fatigue is real — hold form. 120%, 90-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 73% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 50 minutes of work done. 14 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 4:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 4:00 at 120%. Empty the tank. You've got 10 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 4:00 at 120%. Then 10min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 4:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 115-120% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 85% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 28min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 58 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
